claim: RSS 2.0 feed exists at https://www.safersites.ca/drugalerts.rss with Content-Type application/rss+xml
Feed declared via head link rel=alternate type=application/rss+xml at /drugalerts
Feed not at /feed /rss /atom.xml /index.xml — only at /drugalerts.rss
RSS items carry title description pubDate author link but no guid
description contains full HTML body with substance composition lab-confirmation date PDF handbill URLs
pubDate is RFC-822 with timezone (e.g. Tue 05 May 2026 17:50:31 -0500)
Feed sends ETag (weak) but no Last-Modified; Cache-Control public max-age=14400
No JSON API: /api /api/alerts /api/v1/alerts return 404; /wp-json/ returns 403
CMS is NationBuilder (asset hosts; form action /forms/signups; theme origin)
Sitemap and robots.txt return 403 to non-browser agents (Cloudflare bot management)
Alert URL pattern is /YYYYMMDD{substance} (e.g. /20260505fentanyl)
Email subscription is NationBuilder native — no Mailchimp Substack or GovDelivery archive available
Source does not publish explicit expires_at
No explicit rescission signal; rescinded alerts disappear from feed
signal-crawler is oneshot binary; main.go runs r.Run(ctx) and exits
signal-crawler uses infrastructure/config.LoadWithDefaults[T] with env-tag binding
signal-crawler config.yml fields silently override SetDefaults (gotcha)
signal-crawler hardcodes sources in buildSources in main.go (no source-manager integration)
signal-crawler dedup is SQLite at data/seen.db — single seen(source external_id) table
signal-crawler manual wiring (no Uber FX); phase order flags->setup->buildSources->ingest->runner
signal-crawler Dockerfile multi-stage golang:1.26.2-alpine + alpine:3.21; non-root uid/gid 1000
docker-compose entry has restart no and named volume; no health check
signal-crawler is in oneshot skip list in scripts/deploy.sh
Ansible role uses two templates (timer.j2 with OnCalendar parameterized; service.j2 Type=oneshot)
Ansible service template runs as deploy_user on host but uid 1000 inside container
signal-crawler .layers enforces 3 tiers (L0 config L1 adapters L2 runner); no allow exceptions
signal-crawler does NOT publish to Redis; uses HTTP POST to NorthOps
signal-crawler is in maintenance mode; new adapters go to signal-producer per service CLAUDE.md
rfp-ingestor is long-running daemon (ticker) — diverges from signal-crawler oneshot
rfp-ingestor uses bulk ES indexing via raw NDJSON POST /_bulk; bulkSize default 500
rfp-ingestor ES client is plain net/http.Client — no Go ES SDK dependency
Mapping lives in rfp-ingestor/internal/elasticsearch/mapping.go; not in index-manager or infrastructure/esmapping
EnsureIndex does HEAD then PUT idempotently on startup
rfp-ingestor index name rfp_classified_content uses *_classified_content family for search wildcard discovery
content_type must be text with explicit .keyword sub-field (search service queries content_type.keyword)
rfp-ingestor publishes nothing to Redis
Publisher Layer 11 reads content_type==rfp from search index — async downstream routing
rfp-ingestor RFPDocument shape: title url source_name content_type quality_score snippet raw_text topics crawled_at + nested rfp object
rfp-ingestor has only Zap structured logs and a /api/v1/status endpoint — no Prometheus
Spec at docs/specs/rfp-ingestor.md rationalizes bypass for pre-classified data
indigenous-taxonomy package surface has 3 namespaces: Category Region DialectCode
Category has 10 constants (culture language land-rights environment sovereignty education health justice history community)
Region has 16 constants colon-delimited (canada canada:manitoba canada:manitoba:southern canada:north:yukon etc)
No treaty territory tokens exist in package
No First Nations Métis or Inuit community-level slugs exist
No urban Indigenous city designations exist (manitoba:southern only; no cities)
Package has no ParentRegion or Ancestors function — hierarchy implicit only in slug colons
YAML schema/regions.yaml has children: keys but generate.py does not emit a parent lookup table
grep indigenous-taxonomy in north-cloud/*.go returned zero hits — package not yet imported
north-cloud uses hand-rolled shim at infrastructure/indigenous/region.go (7 continental slugs)
publisher/internal/router/indigenous.go uses NC shim (NormalizeRegionSlug); does not import taxonomy package
Package versioning convention: additive=minor bump; rename/remove=major bump
